summary: Iteration 23: Tested 4 fixes for WM Group platform. All features working correctly. 1) Hero buttons read config from buttonConfig DB setting via getSetting('button_config'). 2) CatalogFormGate modal has z-[9999] and overflow-y-auto classes. 3) IntegrationSettings model includes amocrm_catalog_pipeline_id and amocrm_catalog_status_id fields with UI in admin panel. 4) GZip compression working via GZipMiddleware (content-encoding: gzip header present).

minor.issue: button_config not included in bulk settings response when not saved to DB yet. Individual endpoint /api/settings/buttons works correctly with defaults.
amocrm_catalog_pipeline_id and amocrm_catalog_status_id fields not returned in response because they don't exist in DB yet. Pydantic model has defaults but raw DB query doesn't include them.

critical_code_review_comments: The bulk settings endpoint returns only what's in the database. Settings that haven't been saved yet (like button_config) won't appear in the bulk response. The individual endpoints return Pydantic model defaults.
IntegrationSettings in DB doesn't have the new catalog pipeline fields yet. They exist in the Pydantic model but the GET endpoint returns raw DB data without merging defaults.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 4 fixes verified: 1) Hero.jsx uses getSetting('button_config') to read button configuration. handleButtonAction() and getButtonText() functions handle action/target/text from config. 2) CatalogFormGate.jsx has z-[9999] and overflow-y-auto classes on line 51. 3) IntegrationSettings Pydantic model has amocrm_catalog_pipeline_id and amocrm_catalog_status_id fields (lines 487-488). Admin UI shows 'Воронка для скачивания каталога' section with data-testid='amo-catalog-pipeline-select' and 'amo-catalog-status-select'. 4) GZipMiddleware is imported and used in server.py. Response headers include content-encoding: gzip when Accept-Encoding: gzip is sent.

button_config_endpoint.details: GET /api/settings/buttons returns button_config with hero_primary and hero_secondary buttons including action, target, text_pl, text_en

gzip_compression.details: Response has content-encoding: gzip header when Accept-Encoding: gzip is sent

sauny_page.details: Hero section with 2 CTA buttons (OBLICZ CENĘ, ZOBACZ OFERTĘ) visible and working

balie_page.details: Page loads with WM-Balia branding and all sections visible

catalog_form_gate_classes.details: CatalogFormGate.jsx has z-[9999] and overflow-y-auto classes in modal overlay

integration_settings_catalog_fields.details: IntegrationSettings Pydantic model has amocrm_catalog_pipeline_id and amocrm_catalog_status_id fields

admin_integrations_catalog_ui.details: Admin panel Integrations tab shows 'Воронка для скачивания каталога' section with pipeline and status selects

hero_button_config_usage.details: Hero.jsx uses getSetting('button_config') and has handleButtonAction/getButtonText functions

amocrm_catalog_pipeline_logic.details: server.py send_amocrm_lead function checks for catalog_request type and uses catalog pipeline settings
